name: Cooler Master MWE Gold V3 ATX 3.1 Non-Modular 750W Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - DC-to-DC Technology - 450W Native 12V-2x6 PCIe 12+4-Pin Connector - 2 EPS Connectors - 120mm Quiet HDB Fan - 4x PCIe 6+2-Pin Connectors (MPE-7506-ACAG-BUS)
shortName: Cooler Master MWE Gold V3 ATX 3.1 Non-Modular 750W Power Supply - 80
description: 750W non-modular power supply with 80 PLUS Gold certification, ATX 3.1 support, and native PCIe 12V-2x6 connector for high-end systems.
